title: First questions
description: Ask things — questions have a curly mark!
text: Is it red? Do you see? Where is mom? What is that? Why is it hot? How are you? Who is here?
tips: ? is Shift + / on the right side

character_tips.anna: Questions end with ?. Type Shift + / to get it!
character_tips.maxim: Question mark — Shift + slash. Always with capital start.
